subcodes.title: Words to Ali-Kuli Khan spoken in 1900
subcodes.first_line: …every morning when the sun comes up, it does not first send out a herald to wake up the townspeople and tell them to rise and go to work.
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @Imam 'Ali, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @words vs deeds, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
